question: [File: 'File Name: web3/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/web3/repository/TransactionRepository.java -> Scope: '] [Function: findByPayerAccountIdAndValidStartNsOrderByConsensusTimestampAsc()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the Spring Data JPA query derivation for findByPayerAccountIdAndValidStartNsOrderByConsensusTimestampAsc() to trigger a Cartesian product or inefficient JOIN if the Transaction entity has eagerly-loaded associations, causing excessive database load per single API call?
